##NAMES=Florkeite
##RRUFFID=R141068
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(K_3_Ca_2_Na)[Al_8_Si_8_O_32_]·12H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Seekante, Mayener Feld, Southern lava flow, Bellerberg volcano, Ettringen, Mayen, Eifel, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless bladed to prismatic crystals, associated with gismondine and white tobermorite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R141068
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 19.962 b: 14.259 c: 8.699 alpha: 88.36 beta: 125.111 gamma: 89.59 volume: 2023.7 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
